activity-salt-mines.title: Salzwelten Salt Mines Tour
tips: Arrive ~15 minutes before 15:20 admission time.
Temperature in mine ~10°C — bring warm clothes and sturdy shoes.
Tour ~90 min, ~1 km walking.
activity-salt-mines.body:
6/20/26, 4:36 PM tickets.salzwelten.at/en/ticket/eTicket_6a2449fd37428?cHash=5174542c2fd92258271e3f88f491fed5

AUSTRIA

info@salzwelten.at
http://www.salzwelten.at
Salzwelten Salzburg
2 People
Total price: € 70,00 Incl. 13% VAT (€ 8,05)
Date of admission: 08.07.2026 15:20
Order: SBG2661789 06.06.2026 21:15
Important information:
The selected admission time is binding. Please plan your journey so that you arrive about 15
minutes before your chosen time.
This online ticket opens the turnstile at the tour start. No need to queue at the ticket counters.
Guided tour duration: approx. 90 minutes
Walking distance in the mine: around 1 km
Children aged 4 and older are allowed to enter the mine.
The temperature inside the mountain is roughly 10° Celsius. Warm clothing and sturdy footwear
are recommended.
Free parking is available directly on site.
Pets are not permitted.
Admission to the Celtic Mountain including the Salt Manufactory is included free of charge.
You can find the General Terms and Conditions for ticket purchases here
(https://www.salzwelten.at/en/service/legal-conditions/terms-and-conditions-ticketshop).
